economic_notes: Musgamagw Dzawada'enuxw Fisheries Group Limited Partnership (33.33% interest) participates in marine activities and economic development in Musgamagw Territory. Dzawada'enuxw Development Corporation also held via modified equity method. COVID-19 impacts noted including decreased program activity and additional operational costs.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED - First Nation defers all unspent funds as deferred revenue not in accordance with PSAS; $7,028,916 improperly deferred (2020: $3,951,634). If corrected, accumulated surplus would be $11,050,049. CMHC Social Housing Program is consolidated as a subsidiary. Two partnerships (Musgamagw Dzawada'enuxw Fisheries Group LP and Dzawada'enuxw Development Corporation) accounted for using modified equity method. Funds held in Ottawa Trust Fund ($49,849) included in financial assets. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC + ITHA + FNHA + FNESC + CMHC + NVIATS + Ottawa Trust + Province of BC = $6,148,401 - $5,080,163 = $1,068,238. No schedule of remuneration provided.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
